commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared finite-cost coercion helper to the model-usage Python script, applies it to aggregate/current/latest cost readers, and expands regression tests.

PR surface: Other +137. Total +137 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows the cost-reader paths only accept native int/float costs, and the PR body includes before/after CLI output for the aggregate path; I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
